description: Migration runs cleanly on a fresh CE database (no Citus).
Migration runs cleanly on a Citus-enabled database and create_distributed_table succeeds for all three new tables.
teams_notification_deliveries has expected columns with correct types (introspect via information_schema).
teams_notification_deliveries primary key is (tenant, delivery_id).
UNIQUE (tenant, idempotency_key) constraint exists on teams_notification_deliveries and rejects duplicate inserts.
INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (tenant, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING is a safe no-op on duplicate and returns rowCount 0.
CHECK constraint rejects status='nonsense' on teams_notification_deliveries.
CHECK constraint accepts each of skipped, sent, delivered, failed for status.
CHECK constraint rejects error_code='bogus' on teams_notification_deliveries.
CHECK constraint accepts NULL error_code for status='delivered'.
Indexes (tenant, internal_notification_id) and (tenant, status, created_at DESC) exist (introspect pg_indexes).
teams_notification_deliveries is partitioned by RANGE on created_at (introspect pg_partitioned_table).
Migration creates current month + next 2 months as child partitions.
Inserting a row with created_at in current month lands in the correct child partition.
cleanup_teams_notification_deliveries('30 days') drops partitions older than 30 days and leaves newer ones intact.
teams_audit_events has expected columns and PK (tenant, event_id).
CHECK constraint on teams_audit_events.surface accepts the four enum values and rejects others.
CHECK constraint on teams_audit_events.action_id accepts each of the 7 mutation action ids and rejects others.
cleanup_teams_audit_events('365 days') deletes rows older than 365 days only.
teams_conversation_references has expected columns and PK (tenant, microsoft_user_id, conversation_id).
Upsert into teams_conversation_references updates service_url and last_activity_at without inserting a duplicate.
writeTeamsDeliveryRow computes idempotency_key deterministically from (notification_id, tenant, destination_type, destination_id, attempt_number).
writeTeamsDeliveryRow truncates error_message to 1024 chars.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes one row with status='skipped' and error_code='addon_inactive' when ADD_ONS.TEAMS is missing.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes one row with status='skipped' and error_code='integration_inactive' when teams_integrations.install_status != 'active'.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes one row with status='skipped' and error_code='user_not_mapped' when the recipient has no Microsoft account binding.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes one row with status='skipped' and error_code='package_misconfigured' when package metadata baseUrl is missing.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes one row with status='delivered', provider_message_id, sent_at set, error fields NULL on Graph 200 response.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes status='failed' error_code='graph_throttled' retryable=true on Graph 429.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes status='failed' error_code='graph_unauthorized' retryable=false on Graph 401.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes status='failed' error_code='graph_unauthorized' on Graph 403.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes status='failed' error_code='graph_not_found' on Graph 404.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes status='failed' error_code='graph_server_error' retryable=true on Graph 5xx.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl writes status='failed' error_code='transient' retryable=true on network/timeout error.
deliverTeamsNotificationImpl populates provider_request_id when Graph response includes request-id header.
Calling deliverTeamsNotificationImpl twice with same input produces only one persisted row (idempotency).
writeTeamsAuditEvent never persists raw payload string — only payload_hash.
writeTeamsAuditEvent canonicalizes JSON (sorted keys) so two equivalent payloads with different key order produce the same payload_hash.
assign_ticket action writes audit row with surface='bot' (or message_extension/quick_action when invoked from those surfaces), result_status='success' on happy path.
assign_ticket action writes audit row with result_status='failure' and error_code populated when underlying mutation throws.
add_note action writes audit rows on success and failure.
reply_to_contact action writes audit rows on success and failure.
log_time action writes audit rows on success and failure.
approval_response action writes audit rows on success and failure.
create_ticket_from_message action writes audit rows on success and failure.
update_from_message action writes audit rows on success and failure.
Audit row actor_user_id matches the PSA user resolved from the Teams turn token.
Audit row microsoft_user_id matches aadObjectId from turn context when available; NULL otherwise.
First inbound activity from a (tenant, microsoft_user_id, conversation_id) inserts a teams_conversation_references row.
Subsequent activities update last_activity_at and service_url; no duplicate row inserted.
conversation_type is correctly inferred and persisted as personal/groupChat/channel based on turn context conversation.conversationType.
Tenant-scoped writes: inserting delivery row with tenant=A from a session scoped to tenant=B is impossible via the helper (helper always derives tenant from runWithTenant context).
Tenant-scoped writes: every persisted row in teams_notification_deliveries, teams_audit_events, teams_conversation_references has tenant=<expected> for fixtures.
Static check (grep-based) confirms every SQL statement against the three new tables in package code references 'tenant' in WHERE or PK insert columns.
listTeamsDeliveries returns rows only for the authenticated tenant; cross-tenant rows are not visible even when filter parameters would otherwise match.
listTeamsDeliveries throws permission error when caller lacks teams_integration:read.
listTeamsDeliveries respects limit cap (passing limit=1000 is clamped to 200).
listTeamsDeliveries cursor pagination returns a stable second page with no overlap and no skipped rows under concurrent inserts.
listTeamsDeliveries rejects malformed cursor with a clear error.
listTeamsAuditEvents returns rows only for the authenticated tenant.
listTeamsAuditEvents filters by surface, action_id, actor_user_id, result_status as documented.
listTeamsAuditEvents throws permission error when caller lacks teams_integration:read.
CRITICAL: tenant deletion integration test seeds rows into all three new tables and verifies they are removed after the deletion workflow completes.
Tenant deletion test verifies new table entries appear in TENANT_TABLES_DELETION_ORDER BEFORE 'teams_integrations'.
Tenant deletion test verifies DELETE on partitioned teams_notification_deliveries removes rows from all relevant partitions (not just current month).
Tenant deletion test for a tenant that has zero rows in new tables completes without error (no-op deletes are safe).
TypeScript build of @alga-psa/microsoft-teams succeeds with new helpers and server actions; tsup dist exports include the new types.
No raw payload text grep: rg "raw_payload|payload_text|JSON.stringify.*payload" returns no matches inside the new audit recorder code path.
Performance smoke test: 100 sequential deliverTeamsNotificationImpl calls add < 200ms total overhead from instrumentation (rough budget).
Negative test: instrumentation failure (e.g., DB unreachable during writeTeamsDeliveryRow) does NOT prevent the notification from being sent — error is logged and swallowed.
Permission seeder grep: 'teams_integration' read permission is present after running seeders (either pre-existing or newly added in this PR).
Workflow worker grep verification: confirmed whether services/workflow-worker imports deliverTeamsNotificationImpl, and deployment notes updated accordingly.
